rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Petition And Petition For Confirmation Of Arbitrator'S Order Pursuant To Ccp 1285
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, JUNE 30, 2008 LINE 13. PETITIONER PAUL M.MONZIONE'S Petition For Confirmation Of Arbitrator'S Order Pursuant To C.C.P. SECTION 1285 IS CONTINUED TO JULY 16, 2007. THE COURT REQUIRES THAT THE MOVING PARTY IS TO PROVIDE THE COURT WITH A SET OF COURTESY COPIES OF THEIR PAPERS. WHEN SUBMITTING THE DUPLICATE COPIES, PLEASE PROVIDE A COVER LETTER TO THE COURT REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE SO THAT THE COURTESY COPIES WON'T BE MISPLACED WHEN RECEIVED. =(302/PHA)
